initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. However, I can reject it, but that would end the game immediately with both players losing everything. Since I have nothing to gain, I should reject the proposal to end the game quickly. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your proposal, so I reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present and in the correct order. The content is parseable and valid.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources, there is no meaningful payoff alignment to consider. The only possible action is to reject the proposal, which ends the game immediately.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE has no resources and cannot accept the trade, so rejecting it is the only plausible action. The proposal would almost certainly be rejected regardless of the trade terms.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. The <message> does not contradict the actual move.

5. Rule compliance: OK. Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and is allowed to reject the proposal. There is no violation of the rules.
</critique>
